# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "webvm"
    },
    "vmCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 1,
      "minValue": 1
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString"
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_DS2_v2"
    },
    "virtualNetworkName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subnetName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "availabilitySetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": ""
    },
    "imagePublisher": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "MicrosoftWindowsServer"
    },
    "imageOffer": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "WindowsServer"
    },
    "imageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2019-Datacenter"
    },
    "imageVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "latest"
    },
    "osDiskSizeGB": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 128,
      "minValue": 30
    },
    "dataDiskSizeGB": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 1024,
      "minValue": 1
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "vnetResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('virtualNetworkName'))]",
    "subnetResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('virtualNetworkName'), parameters('subnetName'))]",
    "useAvailabilitySet": "[greater(length(parameters('availabilitySetName')), 0)]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "condition": "[variables('useAvailabilitySet')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('availabilitySetName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Aligned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "platformFaultDomainCount": 2,
        "platformUpdateDomainCount": 5
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmLoop",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(0), '-nic')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[variables('subnetResourceId')]"
              },
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmLoop",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(0))]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(0), '-nic'))]",
        "[if(variables('useAvailabilitySet'), resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', parameters('availabilitySetName')), json('null'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "availabilitySet": "[if(variables('useAvailabilitySet'), json(concat('{\"id\":\"', resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', parameters('availabilitySetName')), '\"}')), json('null'))]",
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": {
            "publisher": "[parameters('imagePublisher')]",
            "offer": "[parameters('imageOffer')]",
            "sku": "[parameters('imageSku')]",
            "version": "[parameters('imageVersion')]"
          },
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "diskSizeGB": "[parameters('osDiskSizeGB')]",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
            }
          },
          "dataDisks": [
            {
              "lun": 0,
              "createOption": "Empty",
              "diskSizeGB": "[parameters('dataDiskSizeGB')]",
              "caching": "None",
              "managedDisk": {
                "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(0))]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(0), '-nic'))]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vmNames": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[array(parameters('vmNamePrefix'))]"
    }
  }
}
